name: Commanding Lash
targets: A creature you dealt damage to on your most recent action.
duration: until the end of your target's next turn
description: With the threat of more pain, you compel a creature you've recently harmed. You issue a command to the target, with the effects of the spell .If the target is , , or taking persistent damage, it takes a –2 circumstance penalty to the save. Regardless of the result, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour
